# v1.1.1 — Documentation and presentation overhaul

Post-v1.0.0 polish pass preparing the repository for public communication.
No eval changes, no new retrievers, no ground-truth modifications — all results
from v1.0.0 remain valid and unchanged.

## What changed

- **README rewrite.** Tightened intro, relocated producer documentation to
  `produce/README.md`, recast the LLM-roles section as a transposed role table,
  trimmed verbose hypothesis prose (H5/H6).
- **Architecture diagrams.** Added rendered PNG images alongside Mermaid source
  (image/Mermaid toggle blocks), plus manual-images reference doc with Hetionet,
  PubMed, and Claude pipeline diagrams.
- **Code style pass.** Trimmed verbose docstrings and config comments to lean
  style across the codebase.
- **Analysis notebook.** Re-ran `analysis/explore.ipynb` so rendered charts and
  tables match the published results.
- **Telemetry rename.** `retrieval_context_input_tokens` for clarity (additive —
  old key not removed).

## Still deferred

- **H4 — fuzzy/semantic recall** (type-10 questions, LLM judge calibration) —
  originally noted as deferred to v1.1.0 in the v1.0.0 release notes.
  Rescheduled to a future minor release once judge calibration (Cohen's kappa)
  is complete.

## Configuration

Unchanged from v1.0.0. See the [v1.0.0 release notes](https://github.com/joseph-higaki/biomedical-rag-bench/releases/tag/v1.0.0)
for the full configuration table — generator, judge, embeddings, GraphDB
ruleset, corpus, and question set are identical.
